unmatched.reason: Shear Strength values are reported in MPa across multiple conditions and do not match the available dictionary key static_shear_70c, which expects holding time at 70 C in hours.
Condition definitions are useful as test context but no dedicated dictionary key is provided in the snapshot for storing them as business master data.
details: Warm Water Immersion = 23°C, 24 hours -> 40°C water, 336 hours -> 23°C, 24 hours
Gasoline Immersion = 23°C, 24 hours -> Gasoline, 1 hour -> 23°C, 24 hours
Wax-remover immersion = 23°C, 24 hours -> Wax-remover, 1 hour -> 23°C, 24 hours

unmatched.reason: Tabbing tape recommendations are accessory/process guidance and not confirmed core material parameters for GT7100 items.
Regulatory, contact, warranty, disclaimer, and liability sections are legal or support content and should not be imported as business material data.
unmatched.source_label: Regulatory Information / Contact Information / Technical Information / Warranty / Limitation of Liability
